heading: Featured cards
subtitle: Click a card to learn more.

cards.title: First concept
cards.description: Short explanation revealed on flip. Keep it focused — two or three sentences works well.

cards.title: Second concept
cards.description: Another idea worth unpacking. The back of the card has room for a paragraph of context.

cards.title: Third concept
cards.description: A third point to round out the set. You can use HTML for emphasis and structure.
